description: Composition Olive green stretch trousers made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, has an elasticated waist, two patch pockets at the back and tapering hems Fit Low waist; Tapered fit Wash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Stylish casual trousers for women with a low waist and tapered fit, from scullers. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” waist 26” and hips 36”
